extensionDescription.message: Chrome extension boilerplate developed with Vite, React and Typescript

optionUseSystemThemeDescription.message: Match light or dark mode to your OS and browser. While on, manual theme is disabled.

popupOpenSwitcherDescription.message: Open the Tab Group Switcher overlay

popupShortcutsHelper.message: Chrome opens shortcuts for all extensions — find "TabGroup Selector" and assign or change the key.

popupShortcutsOpenError.message: Could not open Chrome shortcuts. Visit chrome://extensions/shortcuts manually.

optionShowSwitcherOnNewTab.message: Show Tab Group Selector on new tab

optionShowSwitcherOnNewTabDescription.message: When off, new tabs open Chrome's default page (brief extension load may occur first).

switcherPremiumUpgradeCta.message: Upgrade to Premium to switch between every tab group from the shortcut and new-tab switcher.

switcherKeyboardHints.message: Use ↑↓ or click to select • Enter to activate • Esc to close

popupThemePremiumLockedCaption.message: Appearance controls are Premium — free tier uses light theme.

popupNewTabPremiumLockedCaption.message: Premium unlocks replacing the new tab page with the full tab group switcher.

popupAutoGroupingEnableDescription.message: When on, navigations that match your Premium rules group tabs automatically. Rules are configured in Options.

popupAutoGroupingPremiumLockedCaption.message: Premium unlocks automatic grouping from Options rules.

optionAutoGroupingSectionIntro.message: When Premium is enabled, new navigations assign tabs into groups whose title and color match your first matching rule.

optionAutoGroupingPremiumDevToggleDescri.message: Until billing is wired, toggle this locally to unlock Premium features like auto-grouping. Off by default.

optionAutoGroupingPremiumGate.message: Turn on Premium above to configure URL rules.

optionAutoGroupingBroadPatternWarning.message: Avoid very broad patterns (for example *.google.com) so normal search-flow tabs stay ungrouped.

optionAutoGroupingValidationNonEmpty.message: Pattern and group title cannot be empty.

displayErrorDescription.message: Sorry, something went wrong while loading the page.
